chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 295 of 2010 R.A No. 285 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 01.11.2016. Mr. Zaheeruddin S. Laghari, Advocate for applicant in R.A No. 285/2010 and for respondents No. 10 to 14 in R.A No. 295/2010. Applicant Muhammad Sadiq Laghari present in person in R.A No. 295/2010. Mr. Jhamat Jethanand, Advocate for respondent No.1(i) to (iii) in both Revision Applications. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. -.-.-. Both learned Counsel for applicant and applicant in person in these two Revision Applications have concluded their arguments. Due to paucity of time, the matters are adjourned to 28.11.2016 at 08:30 a.m. on which date learned Counsel for private respondent(s) will make submissions being the contesting party as well as learned A.A.G. JUDGE Ali Haider
